channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Big Oil embraces global exploration again as Chevron returns to Libya
item.description: American Big Oil is returning to countries in the Middle East, Africa, and beyond to find new sources of oil and gas.

item.title: ‘The fiscal trajectory is not sustainable’: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
item.description: The national debt is set to surpass the historic high of 106% of GDP (which it reached in 1946) by 2030, according to the CBO.

item.title: At 22, Olympic skier Eileen Gu is worth over $20 million —she’s juggling brand deals and sports with school. And she urges Gen Z not to wait until they’re ‘older’ to start.
item.description: 22-year-old Olympian Eileen Gu is the fourth-highest-paid woman in sports, ahead of stars like Naomi Osaka and Caitlin Clark. Yet she’s still a studen...

item.title: America’s national debt borrowing binge means interest payments will rocket to $2 trillion a year by 2036, CBO says
item.description: Annual interest payments will double to $2.14 trillion by 2036, nearly double the yearly budget for spending on defense.

item.title: The Gen Z job nightmare is so bad that even billionaires are worried their kids won’t be able to keep a job, says wealth advisor to the 0.1%
item.description: It’s a “very real concern” for the ultrawealthy that their children aren’t prepared for the future, wealth adviser Tom Thiegs told Fortune.

item.title: Dow snaps 3-session run of gains, U.S. stocks end lower after January jobs data
The K-shaped economy has turned against the middle class, B. of A. data indicate
The latest jobs report is bad news — except for these fields
Chipotle CEO to customers: Don’t come to us for dollar menus
Dow retreating in final hour, S&P 500 and Nasdaq flat after jobs report — live
